title: Kids in tower-house — sing-taunt 'YOU CAN'T GET US!'
prompt: Wide cinematic shot at @tower-house — wooden tower platform with closed-side panel walls and clear window openings on each side, mulch ground softly visible at the bottom of the frame. POSITION LOCK — Sara stays inside the tower at the LEFT window throughout. Eva stays inside the tower at the RIGHT window throughout. Neither girl moves, climbs, or changes window position at any point in the clip. Exactly TWO girls in the frame. @Sara already inside the tower-house leaning forward at the LEFT window opening, ponytail with bow softly visible, both hands gripping the window frame edges. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both gripping the window frame. Sara stays at this exact window throughout the entire 10s. @Eva already inside the tower-house leaning forward at the RIGHT window opening, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow softly visible, both hands gripping the window frame edges. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both gripping the window frame. Eva stays at this exact window throughout the entire 10s. The tower walls stay plain clean — no marks, no graffiti, no red anywhere. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara peeks her head out of her window, beaming at the camera with a sing-songy taunt-grin. Sara (cheerful sing-song taunt, warm and playful): "You can't get us, Daddy!" Eva pops her head out of her own window, joining the taunt. Eva (cheerful sing-song taunt): "You can't get us!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Both girls together in unison from their separate windows, sing-songy: "You can't get us! You can't get us!" Both giggling helplessly from their locked positions at the windows. Cheerful warm kid-show comedy ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both on the window frame. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both on the window frame. Both girls stay inside the tower at their assigned windows — no leaning out far, no climbing out, no falling.
